title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, April 01 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 02/04/2025
Image reference: 2025-04-02_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-april-01-2025_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker Values have firmed this week, with Midage Handysizes seeing the most significate increase again this weekowing to sales of vessels such as Atlantic Brave and Nimble Nicky. Capesize (Newcastlemax) Global Commande (208,000 DWT, Jun 2010, Universal) sold SS/DD Due to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 32 mil, VV Value USD 31.54 mil. Panamax BC Nautilus (73,400 DWT, May 2001, Sumitomo) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 6.5 mil, VV Value USD 5.78mil
Supramax BC Lowlands Opal (5504000 DWT, Nov 2007, Oshima) to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 11.4 mil, VV Value USD 11.13 mil
Handy BC Atlantic Brave (33,400 DWT, Aug 2016, Shin Kurushima Onishi) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 17.8 mil, VV Value USD 17 mil
Handy BC Nimble Nicky (31,900 DWT, Sep 2010, Hakodate Dock) sold SS/DD Due to undisclosed buyers for USD 11.2 mil, VV Value USD 10.81 mil
Tankers: Tanker values have remained mostly stable over the last week with older tonnage Suezmax and Aframax values firming owing to recent deals
Suezmax Seacross (163,300 DWT, Jan 2006, Hyundai Samho HI) s
